spendAll: You must spend all of your Trait Points before continuing.

STR: As strong as the average kid. You're a kid, right?
Bullies will finally pick someone else.
Your muscles make obvious you're an action person.
Could armwrestle with a minotaur. You'd lose, though.
Could armwrestle with a minotaur, and maybe win.
Superhuman strength. Hard to find clothes that fit those biceps.
END: You're not entirely out of shape.
You're able to endure a lot and keep going.
Your ability to not-die is becoming better and better.
You could challenge an orc to a drinking contest.
You're a complete iron-man, all but unkillable.
AGI: You can walk without tripping. Most of the time.
Not too gangly. Sometimes you manage to get away from danger.
Well coordinated, you can juggle a bit. Just don't use knives.
You can tumble, walk on your hands... Consider a circus career.
You could steal a banana from a monkey.
It's as if you floated. You don't move the same way as other human beings.
INT: Not the brightest torch in the dungeon, are you?
Your intelligence is average. Sorry, someone had to tell you.
You are the village genius. Congratulations.
You are smart enough to realize you're really not that smart.
Your memory and deductive reasoning often scares people.
You feel lonely in this world. Very lonely.
AWA: What was that? The world is often confusing and fuzzy around you.
You learned to keep your eyes and ears open. About time.
Sharp eyes and ears... You notice most of what happens around.
It's very hard to cheat you at cards. Not impossible, though.
Hiding something from you is almost impossible.
Everything is in plain sight for you.
PER: You usually remember to smile to people.
You never have trouble making friends.
You know how to inspire others and influence them.
"You always stand out; people ask you for advice often."
Nothing can stop you and everyone knows it.

stats.STR:
» +1 damage/STR point with [BLUE]hand weapons[].

» +1.5 damage/STR point with [BLUE]2-handed weapons[]

» +0.5 damage/STR point with light weapons.

» Each [BLUE]2 points[] of strength grant [BLUE]+1 hit point/level[].
stats.END:
» Each point of endurance grants [BLUE]+5 base hit points[].

» Each point of endurance grants [BLUE]+1 hit point/level[].

» Each point of endurance grants [BLUE]+5 vs. toxic[] damage.
stats.AGI:
» Each point of AGI grants [BLUE]+1 Armor[].

» +1 damage/AGI point with [BLUE]light[] and [BLUE]ranged[] weapons.

» +0.5 damage/AGI point with [BLUE]hand weapons[].

» Each point of AGI grants +5% chance with [BLUE]traps and locks[].
stats.INT:
» Each point of INT grants [BLUE]+1 mana/level[] to [BLUE]mages[].

» Each point of INT increases [BLUE]XP gained by +2%[].

» Each 2 points of INT grants [BLUE]+1 mana/level[] to [BLUE]clerics[].

» Each 2 points of INT grant +5% chance with [BLUE]traps and locks[].

» Each 2 points of INT grant +5% chance to [BLUE]perception[].
stats.AWA:
» Each point of AWA grants +5% chance to [BLUE]perception[]

» Each 2 points of AWA grant +5% chance to [BLUE]gossip[]

» Bonus of [BLUE]+1 Armor[] for every [BLUE]3 points[] in AWA.

» +1 damage per 2 AWA points, with [BLUE]ranged weapons[].
stats.PER:
» Each point of PER grants [BLUE]+1 mana/level[] to [BLUE]clerics[].

» Each 2 points of PER grant [BLUE]+1 mana/level[] to [BLUE]mages[].

» Each point of PER grants +5% chance to [BLUE]gossip[].

» Each point of PER grants +2 to resist [BLUE]Spirit[] and +5 to resist [BLUE]Death[].
